display_text: Outworld Staff, Cost: 0: A legendary neutral item providing no stats. Its active ability, Self-Exile, makes the caster invulnerable and untargetable for 0.7 seconds. Upon returning, the caster takes 5% of their max health as damage, which is non-lethal but disables Blink Dagger. Stats: CD: 30s, Mana: 65, Duration: 0.7s, Return Damage: 5% Max HP.
